---
title: "Rashelle Hoffman"
listing:
  contents: code
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  image-placeholder: "https://github.com/bhelsel/2026-RLAB-Practical-Exercises/raw/main/images/rlab-placeholder.png"
  image-height: 200px
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
---

<div class="profile">
  <img src="https://dms.creighton.edu/sites/default/files/faculty-images/rashelle-hoffman.webp">
</div>
